pages.text:
**NOTARIAL DEED OF SALE**
**Meester Jan Claes**
**Notary in Bruges**
**Bruges, 12 September 1985**

**DEED ID: purchase_001**

---

**APPEARANCES**

On this day, the twelfth of September, nineteen hundred and eighty-five, before Meester Jan Claes,
Notary Public, residing in Bruges, Belgium, appeared:

1. **Hendrik Janssen**, born on the fifteenth of March, nineteen hundred and forty-eight, and
2. **Maria Janssen-De Vos**, born on the twenty-second of July, nineteen hundred and fifty-one,
both residing at Kerkstraat 12, 8000 Bruges, Belgium, married to each other and hereinafter referred to
as "the Buyers".

AND

3. **De Bruyne Vastgoed NV**, a limited liability company incorporated under the laws of Belgium, with
registered office at [insert address], duly represented by its lawful director [insert name], hereinafter
referred to as "the Seller".

**RECITALS**

The Buyers declare that this transaction constitutes their first major acquisition of family property. The
Seller is the lawful owner of the property described herein and is duly authorized to sell the property as
per the company’s internal regulations.

---

**ARTICLE 1: OBJECT OF THE SALE**

The Seller hereby sells and the Buyers hereby purchase the immovable property located at Kerkstraat 12,
8000 Bruges, Belgium, hereinafter referred to as "the Property". The Property is described as follows:
- **Cadastral reference**: Bruges, 1st division, section A, number 245/B.
- **Property type**: Family house.

**ARTICLE 2: TITLE AND ORIGIN OF OWNERSHIP**

The Seller warrants that it is the sole and rightful owner of the Property and that the Property is free from
any liens, encumbrances, or claims of third parties, except as may be disclosed in this deed. The origin of
ownership is evidenced by the deed of acquisition dated [insert date of acquisition], registered at the

Bruges Registry of Deeds.

**ARTICLE 3: SALE PRICE AND PAYMENT**

The total purchase price for the Property is set at **Eighty-Five Thousand Euros (EUR 85,000)**. The
Buyers shall pay the full purchase price by bank transfer to the Seller’s designated account at the time of
signing this deed.

**ARTICLE 4: TRANSFER OF POSSESSION AND ENJOYMENT**

The possession and enjoyment of the Property shall be transferred to the Buyers immediately upon the
signing of this deed. The Buyers shall have the right to occupy, use, and enjoy the Property as of this
date.

**ARTICLE 5: WARRANTIES, EASEMENTS, AND URBAN PLANNING DECLARATIONS**

The Seller warrants that the Property is sold with all its rights and appurtenances. The Seller further
declares that there are no known easements affecting the Property, save any that might be disclosed in
this deed or are required under local urban planning regulations.

**ARTICLE 6: TAXES, REGISTRATION DUTIES, AND COSTS**

The Buyers shall bear all costs associated with the registration of this deed and any applicable taxes or
duties. The Buyers agree to indemnify the Seller against any claims for payment of taxes or costs related
to the Property arising after the date of this deed.

**ARTICLE 7: ELECTION OF DOMICILE / MISCELLANEOUS CLAUSES**

For all matters relating to this deed, the Buyers elect domicile at the Property address. Any modification
of this deed shall be made in writing and signed by both parties. This deed shall be governed by and
construed in accordance with Belgian law.

---

**CLOSING**

Thus, read, approved, and signed in the presence of the undersigned Notary, who certifies the identity of
the parties and that they have understood the contents of this deed.

**For the Buyers**:

Hendrik Janssen
_________________________
Maria Janssen-De Vos
_________________________

**For the Seller**:

De Bruyne Vastgoed NV
By: [insert name of director]
_________________________

**Notary Public**:

Meester Jan Claes
_________________________

**Witnesses**:
[Insert names of witnesses, if applicable]

---

**End of Deed**

---

**CLOSING**

Thus, read, approved, and signed in the presence of the undersigned Notary, who certifies the identity of

**For the Buyers**:

Hendrik Janssen
_________________________
Maria Janssen-De Vos
_________________________

**For the Seller**:

De Bruyne Vastgoed NV
By: [insert name of director]
_________________________

**Notary Public**:

Meester Jan Claes
_________________________

**Witnesses**:
[Insert names of witnesses, if applicable]

---

**End of Deed**
